How much for a step 44 ft wide, 8 ft deep and 6 in high.
Sent from my BlackBerryR wireless handheld  

-----Original Message-----
From: "John Amerling" <jamerling@rrcaribbean.com>
Date: Thu, 9 Nov 2006 15:27:18 
To:"Darren Indyke" <dkiesq@aol.com>
Subject:

Here are some rules of thumb for pricing concrete placement and flatwork
on St. Thomas. For concrete figure $145 a cubic yard. Figure $3.75 a
square foot for placement a figure which includes edge forms, mesh, and
appropriate equipment, i.e. bull floats and screeds.
